title: erigeron bellidiastroides
intro: Erigeron bellidiastroides, also known as the Western daisy or Fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron bellidiastroides include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and act as a natural remedy for fever and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
